title: Riposte

markdown:
# Riposte

When a creature misses you with a melee attack roll, you can take a [[reaction]] and expend one Superiority Die to make a melee attack roll with a weapon or an [[unarmed_strike]] against the creature. If you hit, add the Superiority Die to the attack's damage.
